description: Context-aware paragraph classification considering neighboring content

cases.input:
Long good paragraph with many words and sufficient length.

Short.

Another long good paragraph with adequate length.
cases.expected_output:
Long good paragraph with many words and sufficient length.
Short.
Another long good paragraph with adequate length.

cases.input:
Short at start.

Long content paragraph with many words and sufficient length.
cases.expected_output:
Short at start.
Long content paragraph with many words and sufficient length.

cases.input:
Long content paragraph with many words and sufficient length.

Short at end.
cases.expected_output:
Long content paragraph with many words and sufficient length.
Short at end.

cases.input:
Boilerplate with high link density. LinkLink

Long content paragraph.

Another boilerplate.
cases.expected_output:
Boilerplate with high link density. Link Link
Long content paragraph.
Another boilerplate.

cases.input:
Long content paragraph.

Short paragraph exactly 100 characters long. This is exactly 100 chars.

Another long paragraph.
cases.expected_output:
Long content paragraph.
Short paragraph exactly 100 characters long. This is exactly 100 chars.
Another long paragraph.

cases.input:
Long content paragraph.

Short paragraph of 99 characters. This is exactly 99 characters long, just below threshold.

Another long paragraph.
cases.expected_output:
Long content paragraph.
Short paragraph of 99 characters. This is exactly 99 characters long, just below threshold.
Another long paragraph.

cases.input:
First long paragraph.

Short with high link density link.

Second long paragraph.
cases.expected_output:
First long paragraph.
Short with high link density link .
Second long paragraph.

cases.input:
Long paragraph.

Short.

Medium length paragraph but still content.

Short.

Long paragraph.
cases.expected_output: Medium length paragraph but still content.
